summary: Mixed show with a standout Hell in a Bucket but missing Fire on the Mountain; recording quality not discussed.
review: One reviewer notes Bob Weir’s gritty delivery during “Hell In A Bucket,” giving the performance an energetic edge, while another bemoans that this Scarlet show is the first in years without a “Fire on the Mountain.” No comments were made about the source or clarity of the recording, leaving its technical quality unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews: one neutral (3★) and one very negative (0★). The show is praised for a single song but criticized for the omission of a classic, and there’s no information on recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention sound clarity, mix balance, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing; the main critique is the absence of “Fire on the Mountain” from an otherwise typical Scarlet set.

band_member_comments.Bob: Mentioned for his gritty vocal delivery (“spitting”) during Hell In A Bucket.
